Yeh document "Return Policy" ke saath shuru hota hai, jisme return ki shartein aur prakriya di gayi hain. Iske baad "Refund Request" ka zikr hota hai, jisme refund ke liye aavedan karne ki prakriya aur shartein batayi gayi hain.
Yeh document "Budget Review" ke saath shuru hota hai, jisme budget ki jaankari di gayi hai. Iske baad "Community Questions" ke section mein samudaay ke prashn aur unke uttar diye gaye hain.
Yeh document "Safety Guidelines" ke saath shuru hota hai, jisme suraksha ke niyam diye gaye hain. Iske baad "Emergency Contact" ki jankari di gayi hai, jo emergency ke samay madad ke liye upyogi hai.

Yeh document pehle "Privacy Notice" aur phir "Data Export" ko list karta hai. Privacy Notice mein user ki personal information ke suraksha ke baare mein jaankari di gayi hai, jabki Data Export mein data ko bahar bhejne ke tareeqe aur niyam bataye gaye hain.

Yeh document "Course Requirements" ke baare mein hai jo "Final Exam" se pehle aata hai. Ismein course ke zaroori shartein aur requirements di gayi hain, jo students ko complete karni hoti hain, uske baad hi final exam hota hai.
Is document mein pehle "Office Hours" ka zikr hai, uske baad "Makeup Exam" ka mention hai.
Yeh document "Payment Deadline" ko pehle list karta hai, uske baad "Late Fee" ka zikr hai.
Yeh document "Visitor Guidelines" ke saath shuru hota hai, jo mehmaanon ke liye niyam batata hai. Iske baad "Check-In Desk" ka zikr hota hai, jahan mehmaan apni entry karte hain.
Yeh document "Account Settings" ke baad "Password Reset" ko list karta hai.

Yeh document "Health Benefits" ke baare mein jankari deta hai, jisme health se judi suvidhaon ke fayde bataye gaye hain. Iske baad "Enrollment Form" diya gaya hai, jisme vyakti apni details bhar kar health benefits ke liye register kar sakta hai.
